contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: iching_oracle QMDJ overlay implementation, two-PR cluster (#8 client, #9 GAS prompt) on the oracle repo. PR #8: smoke-tested qimen-dunjia v2.1.0 vs lunar-javascript and confirmed it has first-class QMDJ (the spec's recommendation needed correction); wired the standalone IIFE bundle from jsdelivr; cast the chart from each I-Ching cast's local timestamp; rendered a 3x3 grid (south-up) below the I-Ching reading using the existing reference-panel chrome for visual consistency; built a comprehensive glossary with reference tables for all 9 palaces (direction + trigram + element + life-domain), 8 doors, 9 stars, 10 spirits (yang and yin variants), and 10 heavenly stems; added a heuristic outlook tint per palace (5 levels: Strong window / Favorable / Mixed / Caution / Avoid) computed from door + spirit + stems + 值符 bonus, with the full scoring rule exposed in-page for audit; honest modern-synthesis disclaimers throughout. PR #9: client now serializes the chart payload (header fields + 9 palaces with pre-computed outlook) and sends it as a qmdj_chart query param; GAS extractDraw_ accepts it defensively; new QMDJ_FRAMEWORK_REFERENCE constant in the cached static block teaches the LLM how to read the chart; new formatQmdjChartBlock_ helper renders the chart into the dynamic context; ORACLE_PROMPT_HEADER extended with a complementary-lens framing paragraph and two new output sections (QMDJ configuration of this moment + Combined frame), with the decisive-action section instructed to use QMDJ directional/timing signals when present and explicitly NOT fabricate them otherwise. Worktree-based to avoid clobbering parallel session's in-flight gas/index.html changes on fix/advisory-panel-overflow. GAS code change requires a clasp push + Apps Script web-app version bump from gas/ to take effect; PR #2 is otherwise backward-compatible (qmdj_chart is optional).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
--------
